# CDI Proteomics Analysis System

**Results-First Edition**

This guide introduces a practical system for interpreting proteomics results after receiving processed output tables from a proteomics facility, collaborator, or vendor.

The focus is on moving from differential protein abundance results to biological interpretation.

```text
Proteomics result tables
        ↓
Differential abundance results
        ↓
Protein filtering and ranking
        ↓
Identifier cleaning and annotation
        ↓
GO and pathway enrichment
        ↓
STRING network analysis
        ↓
Biological interpretation
        ↓
Reproducible report
```
